sections.title: Standard dialogue after finishing Icthlarin's Little Helper

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey there. How're you holding up?

lines.speaker: Carpenter
lines.text: Not too bad. Still, I hope we can get rid of these spots soon.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey there. How're you holding up?

lines.speaker: Carpenter
lines.text: Not too bad. Still, I hope we can get rid of these spots soon.

lines.speaker: Carpenter
lines.text: The embalmer has been importing a soothing balm from a merchant called Ali M. It's meant to stop the itching.

lines.speaker: Carpenter
lines.text: Not even remotely, but it sure does keep the flies away.

sections.title: Standard dialogue after finishing Beneath Cursed Sands

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey there. How're you holding up?

lines.speaker: Carpenter
lines.text: Much better now that we've finally got rid of those spots.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's great to hear! All the best.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I thought this acne potion might help ease your spots.

lines.speaker: Carpenter
lines.text: What? You intolerable, insufferable idiot. That won't work! I would say get out of my sight but that's not far enough away!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I was just trying to help.

lines.speaker: Carpenter
lines.text: Clear off before I give you something to feel sorry about!
